{{Quote|You have entered Naboo space, under the protection of the Royal Security Forces. Please identify yourself and your reason for visiting Naboo.|The Naboo Space Station hailing a starship|<ref name="SWG:JtL" />}}
The '''Naboo Space Station''', also called '''Naboo Station''', was the home of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]], and was also used to provide emergency repairs to damaged ships, as well as clearing incoming ships to land on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] itself.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
